sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45202" key="eu)su/gkritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσύγ-κρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, either <sense id="n45202.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-compounded, well-constituted</tr_>, or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">discriminating</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
